name: Cod in Lemon Parsley Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the margarine in a 2 quart (12 x 7-inch) glass baking dish. Microwave on High for 2 minutes, or until melted.
2. Blend together the cornstarch, lemon juice, parsley, and pepper.
3. Dip each fillet in the seasoned margarine.
4. Arrange the fillets with the thick edges toward the outside of the dish.
5. Cover with plastic wrap.
6. Microwave on High for 8 or 9 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily. Let stand, covered, for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
